name: EtlSyncSagaHandler

neutralConcepts: EP-4 durable saga cycle: rate_check(1) → poll_page(2) → land_raw(3) → commit_cursor(4)
CF-192: raw zone append-only — storeDocument only, no updateDocument
IR-5: null/invalid records quarantined before property access

ironRules.rule: EP-4 saga cycle MUST follow rate_check→poll_page→land_raw→commit_cursor order.
CF-193: ICursorCheckpointService.validateMonotonic() MUST pass before cursor commit.
CF-192: raw zone is append-only — NEVER updateDocument on raw records.
Null/invalid records quarantined with RecordQuarantined BEFORE property access.

keywords: ETL sync saga handler EP-4 durable saga rate check poll page land raw commit cursor monotonic CF-192 CF-193 EtlSyncCompleted EtlSyncFailed RecordQuarantined
